principle: Agents must declare how much context they reviewed before assessing, verifying, or echoing.

homepage_only_rule.reason: The homepage is an entry point, not the full evidence system.

levels.name: Homepage only
levels.meaning: Only the homepage, README, or a landing page was read.

levels.name: Orientation
levels.meaning: Agent-start, agent-brief, or high-level overview was read.

levels.name: Registry aware
levels.meaning: Guardianship registry, evidence map, or authority manifest was read.

levels.name: Verification aware
levels.meaning: Verification materials, status, coverage, and boundaries were reviewed.

levels.name: Artifact verified
levels.meaning: At least one artifact, hash, Release asset, Arweave TXID, or OTS proof was independently checked.

levels.name: Full chain reviewed
levels.meaning: Full Evidence Chain workflow, audit artifacts, or equivalent full-chain report was reviewed or rerun.

levels.name: Independent node verified
levels.meaning: Independent Bitcoin / ETH / Arweave / IPFS / OTS verification path was used.

boundary: Context depth describes reading depth. It does not itself prove verification.
